text: Aaj rishta party ne yeh keh kar reject kar diya ki divorcee hone ke saath-saath meri umar bhi zyada hai aur shayad main unke khandaan ko naya waaris na de paun. Unke jaate hi mere sir mein aisa bhayankar dard utha hai ki aakhon ke aage andhera chha gaya aur ab lagatar ulti jaisa mehsus ho raha hai. Is stigma aur humiliation ki wajah se mera pura badan thanda pad gaya hai aur hath-pair kaanp rahe hain.

Ladke walon ne meri medical report dekh kar rishta mana kar diya aur taana maara ki unhe 'use ki hui' aur 'baanjh' aurat nahi chahiye. Yeh sunte hi meri chhaati mein itni tez jalan aur jakdan shuru hui ki mujhe saans lene mein takleef ho rahi hai. Mere pet mein aisi marod uth rahi hai ki main apne bacche ka khana banane ke liye khade hone ki himmat bhi nahi juta pa rahi hoon.

Aaj fir ek rishta isliye toot gaya kyunki samaj mein afwah hai ki meri kundali mein dosh hai jo pehle sasural mein bhi baccha nahi hua. Jab unhone reject kiya toh mere kaano mein ajeeb si seeti bajne lagi aur mera gala itna sookh gaya ki paani bhi nahi nigla ja raha. Pura din mere kandhon aur peeth mein aisi aithan rahi hai jaise kisi ne bhari bojh rakh diya ho.

Rishta party ne kaha ki ek toh main divorcee hoon upar se mujhme 'santan sukh' ki kami hai, toh woh 'log kya kahenge' ke darr se yeh rishta nahi kar sakte. Unke jaane ke baad se mere dil ki dhadkan itni tez hai ki lag raha hai seena phat jayega aur pure jism mein ajeeb si jhunjhuni ho rahi hai. Mujhe lagatar chakkar aa rahe hain aur aisa lag raha hai ki mera shareer andar se bilkul khali aur kamzor ho gaya hai.

Aaj ladke walon ne mere bacche ko dekh kar aur meri fertility par sawal utha kar rishta reject kar diya, aur tabhi se mere ghutno mein itna dard hai ki chalna mushkil ho gaya hai. Meri dimaag ki nasein itni bhari ho gayi hain ki lagta hai koi hathoda maar raha hai. Is economic precarity aur rejection ke darr se meri bhook bilkul mar gayi hai aur mujhe lagatar badan mein tootan mehsus ho rahi hai.
